title: Stadium AR — ultra-low latency
narrative: Enterprise tenant offers immersive AR on a dedicated DNN. PCF maps URLLC-style intent to low-latency service type, applies premium QoS, and exposes CHF-ready rating keys.
expected_outcomes: Intent maps to service_type low_latency with 5QI-style hint applied on decision
Prometheus histogram pcf_policy_decision_seconds shows sub-10ms on idle hot path
CHF quote returns rating_group and charging_key for session charging
